---
title: "Other Publications"
subtitle: "Institutional reports, invited contributions, and theses"
description-meta: "Institutional reports, invited contributions, and theses by Andrés André Camargo Bertel"
title-block-banner: false
---

## Institutional Reports

National Mining and Energy Planning Unit (UPME). *National Energy Plan, Volume II — Results 2025–2055.* Bogotá, Colombia. Member of the document's drafting team; transport-sector modeler. *(Forthcoming — expected August 2026.)*

## Invited Contributions

**Camargo-Bertel, A. A.**, A. González-Quiroga, and O. Pupo-Roncallo. "Decarbonizing the cement industry in Latin America and the Caribbean." *International Cement Review*, UREMA Research Unit, Universidad del Norte, Colombia. *(Invited contribution — forthcoming, expected August 2026.)*

## Theses

**Camargo-Bertel, A. A.** *The role of passenger road transport electrification in renewable energy integration in Colombia: future scenario analysis.* Master's thesis, Universidad del Norte, Barranquilla, Colombia, 2024. Available at: [http://hdl.handle.net/10584/12884](http://hdl.handle.net/10584/12884){target="_blank"}

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
